mock_resolution.notes: MOCK-02-001 was a test-seam description only, not a code artifact. No production mock code was introduced. Resolved by virtue of Story 01 being merged before Story 02.

integration_tests.evidence: 194 Python tests pass (test_cli.py, test_weights.py, test_config.py, test_ipc_handler.py, e2e/), 25 JS frontend tests pass. 4 skipped (slow model-loading tests).

cross_story_check.seam_verified: state_changed(loading) emitted by backend (Story 01) and frontend null-initialized to accept it (Story 02). AC-004 ordering guarantee holds: loading arrives before idle/error.

residual_risks: DOM side-effects of updateLoadingOverlayForState not covered by automated tests (spinner visibility, label text). JS tests use plain object simulation rather than calling real main.ts functions. Medium severity gap.
loading→paused transition documented in spec FR1 and protocol.py:256 is unreachable via current IPC (start_paused not in InitCommand schema). Pre-existing divergence, not introduced by this epic.
No Playwright/Docker E2E tests (Tauri desktop app, not applicable by design)

counterfactual_feedback.issue: JS frontend tests operate on plain JS object mutations rather than calling real main.ts functions
counterfactual_feedback.if_available_earlier: Explicit requirement for JSDOM + real handleMessage() calls in test design phase
counterfactual_feedback.retrieval_key: JSDOM integration test real function calls DOM assertions
